metadata.name: Coating Library
metadata.description: Friction range, temperature range, corrosion class and remarks for ten coating/plating families.
metadata.primary_source: ISO 16047 (friction test methodology) / ISO 4042 (electroplated coatings); all records reference_only (typical range, not a specific test report).

records.notes: Typical friction/temperature/corrosion figures for the named coating family -- reference_only. A coating-specific test report per ISO 16047 must govern production torque-tension calculations; this record is not that report.
records.source: ISO 16047 / ISO 4042 (typical range, not a test report)
